name: zimage-skill
description: Generate images using ModelScope Z-Image-Turbo API. Use when user asks to generate, create, or make images, pictures, or illustrations.
capabilities: Generate images from text prompts using ModelScope Z-Image-Turbo API
Support Chinese and English prompt inputs
Save generated images to user-specified file paths
Handle API authentication via environment variable
Provide status updates during image generation process
author: yizhiyanhua-ai
securitySummary: Legitimate image generation skill. Static scanner flagged standard API integration patterns (network calls, credential handling) and documentation code blocks. All findings are false positives - the skill makes intentional API calls to ModelScope and uses standard environment variable pattern for API authentication.
valueStatement: Users need AI-generated images but lack technical knowledge of image generation APIs. This skill provides a simple interface to the ModelScope Z-Image-Turbo model for creating images from natural language descriptions.
limitations: Requires a valid ModelScope API key to function
Maximum wait time of 120 seconds per generation
Output limited to JPG and PNG formats
Depends on external ModelScope API availability

useCases.title: Create Social Media Graphics
useCases.description: Generate illustrations for social media posts, blog articles, or marketing materials by describing the desired visual concept.

useCases.title: Design Quick Concept Art
useCases.description: Create rough concept visualizations for design projects, game characters, or creative brainstorming sessions.

useCases.title: Produce Personalized Avatars
useCases.description: Generate custom avatar images based on descriptive prompts such as style, appearance, and mood.

promptTemplates.title: Simple Image Request
promptTemplates.scenario: Basic image generation with a straightforward description

promptTemplates.title: Detailed Art Description
promptTemplates.prompt: Create an image: [detailed description including style, mood, lighting, and composition]
promptTemplates.scenario: When you need specific artistic control over the output

promptTemplates.title: Style-Specific Generation
promptTemplates.scenario: Requesting images in specific artistic styles like Ghibli, cyberpunk, or oil painting

promptTemplates.title: Custom Output Path
promptTemplates.scenario: Specifying where to save the generated image

bestPractices: Use detailed descriptions including style, lighting, and composition for better results
Add quality keywords like 'high definition', '4K', or 'cinematic' to improve output quality
Specify the art style explicitly (oil painting, anime, photography, etc.) for consistent aesthetics
antiPatterns: Do not use extremely long prompts with contradictory descriptions
Avoid requesting multiple unrelated objects in a single generation
Do not omit the API key - the skill requires MODELSCOPE_API_KEY to function

faq.question: How do I get a ModelScope API key?
faq.answer: Visit modelscope.cn, create an account, and generate a token at modelscope.cn/my/myaccesstoken. The key is free to obtain.

faq.question: What image formats are supported?
faq.answer: The skill outputs JPG by default. You can specify PNG or other formats by using the appropriate file extension in the output path.

faq.question: Why does image generation fail with timeout?
faq.answer: Check your network connection, verify the API service is available, and ensure your prompt does not violate content guidelines.

faq.question: How can I improve image quality?
faq.answer: Add descriptive details, specify the art style, and include quality keywords like 'high definition', '4K', or 'cinematic lighting'.

faq.question: What languages are supported?
faq.answer: Both Chinese and English prompts are supported. The ModelScope API handles both languages effectively.

faq.question: Where are images saved by default?
faq.answer: Images save to result_image.jpg in the current directory unless you specify a custom path as the second argument.
